events.title: Spirit Surge
events.message: Heaven and earth answer your meditation — qi floods your meridians!

events.title: Dao Inspiration
events.message: A flash of enlightenment carries you beyond ordinary cultivation.

events.title: Meridian Awakening
events.message: Hidden meridians crack open; power surges through every channel.

events.title: Scripture Whisper
events.message: Ancient script forms in the void before your eyes.

events.title: Heavenly Glimpse
events.message: The heavens part — a complete technique manual imprints upon your soul!

events.title: Spirit Vein
events.message: You tap a buried spirit vein beneath your meditation mat.

events.title: Inner Peace
events.message: Your mind stills like a moonlit lake; body and spirit recover together.
